title: Mean Reversion Dip Strategy Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Mean Reversion Dip trading strategy. Defines entry, profit management, downside management, risk controls, and output settings.

strategy_name.description: Name identifying the strategy instance (required, max 100 chars)

version.description: Version identifier for the strategy configuration (max 10 chars)

UniverseConfig.description: Defines the asset universe for the strategy

mode.description: Asset selection method: single_asset for one instrument, watchlist for a group

assets.description: List of asset symbols or identifiers (e.g. ["AAPL"])

direction.description: Trade direction: long_only, short_only, or long_short

DataConfig.description: Data source configuration for price data

price_field.description: Which price field to use for calculations

after_buy_days.description: Number of days to wait after a buy before allowing another trade

after_sell_days.description: Number of days to wait after a sell before allowing another trade

max_trades_per_asset_per_30d.description: Maximum number of trades per asset in a rolling 30-day window

EntryConfig.description: Entry strategy configuration - when and how to enter a position

type.description: Entry strategy type: dip_buy (mean reversion), breakout, or indicator_signal

lookback_T.description: Lookback period in bars for dip detection

dip_threshold_pct.description: Dip threshold as a decimal (e.g. -0.12 means the price must be 12% below the reference)

DipReferenceConfig.description: Defines how the reference price for dip detection is calculated

type.description: Reference type: price_T_ago (price T bars ago), highest_in_window, or moving_average

period.description: Period parameter for the reference calculation (used by highest_in_window and moving_average)

indicator.description: Indicator name for moving_average reference type (e.g. 'SMA', 'EMA')

SizingConfig.description: Position sizing configuration - how much to buy/sell

mode.description: Sizing mode: pct_portfolio (percentage of portfolio value) or absolute_amount (fixed monetary amount)

pct.description: Percentage of portfolio (e.g. 0.03 = 3%). Used when mode is pct_portfolio

amount.description: Fixed monetary amount. Used when mode is absolute_amount

ProfitManagementConfig.description: Profit-taking configuration - defines scale-out tranches and final take-profit

scale_out_enabled.description: Whether to perform partial exits (scale-out) at different profit levels

sell_fraction_basis.description: Basis for computing sell fractions: initial_position or current_position

scale_out_plan.description: Array of exit tranches executed sequentially as profit targets are hit

ScaleOutTrancheConfig.description: A single scale-out tranche - defines when to sell a portion of the position

sell_remainder.description: If true, sell the entire remaining position at this tranche (overrides sell_fraction)

TriggerConfig.description: Trigger condition for scale-out or other events

type.description: Trigger type: pct_gain (percentage gain), absolute_profit, or indicator-based

reference.description: Price reference for gain calculation: avg_cost or initial_entry_price

TakeProfitConfig.description: Final take-profit configuration - sell all remaining when target is reached

pct.description: Target gain percentage (e.g. 0.10 = 10%). Used when mode is pct_gain

profit_amount.description: Target absolute profit amount. Used when mode is absolute_profit

action.description: Action to execute when take-profit is triggered (e.g. 'sell_all_remaining')

DownsideManagementConfig.description: Downside/loss management configuration - defines stop-loss or averaging-down behavior

loss_action.description: Which loss management variant to apply: A_sell_loss (stop-loss) or B_average_down (buy more at lower prices)

DownsideTriggerConfig.description: Defines when downside management is triggered

down_threshold_pct.description: Loss threshold as a decimal (e.g. -0.10 means 10% loss triggers downside management)

decision_basis.description: Decision method: simple_threshold, indicator-based, statistical, or hybrid (combines all)

indicator_rules.description: Technical indicator rules (used when decision_basis is 'indicator' or 'hybrid')

statistical_rules.description: Statistical rules (used when decision_basis is 'statistical' or 'hybrid')

IndicatorRuleConfig.description: A technical indicator rule for decision-making

type.description: Indicator type: rsi, zscore, sma, or ema

IndicatorParams.description: Parameters for technical indicators and statistical rules

length.description: Period for period-based indicators (RSI, SMA, EMA)

lookback.description: Lookback period for statistical calculations (e.g. z-score)

SellLossConfig.description: Variant A: Stop-loss configuration - sell position when loss exceeds threshold

enabled.description: Whether this stop-loss variant is active

stop_type.description: Stop-loss method: hard_stop (fixed threshold) or indicator_stop (indicator-based)

stop_threshold_pct.description: Stop-loss threshold as a decimal (e.g. -0.10 = 10% loss)

order_type.description: Order type for the stop-loss exit

AverageDownConfig.description: Variant B: Averaging-down configuration - buy more at lower prices to reduce average cost

enabled.description: Whether this averaging-down variant is active

max_adds.description: Maximum number of additional purchases allowed

recalculate_avg_cost.description: Whether to recalculate average cost after each additional purchase

AddStepRuleConfig.description: Rule defining when to make additional purchases during averaging down

type.description: Add rule type: each_n_pct_drop (buy on each N% drop), indicator_based, or custom

drop_pct_step.description: Percentage drop step for each_n_pct_drop (e.g. 0.10 = buy on each 10% drop)

RiskControlsConfig.description: Risk management parameters - portfolio-level exposure and drawdown limits

max_position_exposure_pct.description: Maximum percentage of portfolio value in a single position (e.g. 0.10 = 10%)

max_position_drawdown_pct.description: Maximum drawdown allowed per position before force exit (e.g. 0.25 = 25%)

force_exit_on_risk_breach.description: Whether to force-liquidate the position when risk limits are breached

block_entry_if_exposure_exceeded.description: Whether to block new entries if the exposure limit is already exceeded

block_add_if_exposure_exceeded.description: Whether to block averaging-down if the exposure limit is already exceeded

OutputsConfig.description: Output configuration - which events to emit and metrics to track

emit_events.description: Events to emit during strategy execution (e.g. ENTRY, BUY, SCALE_OUT_1, STOP_EXIT, SELL_ALL)

track_metrics.description: Metrics to track (e.g. avg_cost, position_qty, unrealized_pnl, max_drawdown)
